arts.ttl: Andrea Berta being tasked with finalising major Arsenal signing, club remain confident
arts.sum: Arsenal’s new sporting director Andrea Berta is being tasked with finalising the transfer of Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi. The Italian recently took over from Edu at the Emirates Stadium, and it now seems that one of his main first tasks is to ensure the signing of Zubimendi is delivered. arts.ttl: Arsenal hold talks with the agent of France international who has a habit of winning trophies
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly in advanced discussions to sign Bayern Munich winger Kingsley Coman, according to Football Insider. Despite being under contract until 2027, Coman has struggled with injuries and has seen reduced playing time under manager Vincent Kompany. The France international star, who is also being chased by Tottenham, is looking to leave Bayern Munich […] The post Arsenal hold talks with the agent of France international who has a habit of winning trophies appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs. Crystal Palace: "Vibes" verdict delivered as PSG looms for Mikel Arteta
arts.sum: Arsenal's Premier League London derby with Crystal Palace on Wednesday night has "pre-season vibes" written all over it, expert Charles Watts claims.

arts.ttl: Palace to face Brighton in PL2 play-off
arts.sum: Crystal Palace Under-21s will take on rivals Brighton & Hove Albion on Monday, 28th April (19:00 BST) at the VBS Community Stadium.

arts.ttl: “On top of it” – Mikel Arteta issues encouraging update on Arsenal star’s future
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta seems relaxed about Bukayo Saka’s future at the Emirates Stadium, saying he’s sure the club are “on top of it”. arts.ttl: Arsenal and Tottenham sent damning Marcus Rashford transfer update amid Man United uncertainty
arts.sum: Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur have been told that Manchester United winger Marcus Rashford is unlikely to sign for them despite the England international wanting Champions League football next season. It is understood that the forward is biding his time to see if a 'bigger club' would want him who can also offer Champions League football before committing to Villa.

arts.ttl: Arsenal fixtures compared to PSG and potential Champions League finalists Barcelona and Inter
arts.sum: PSG (H) - 29 April - Champions League semi-final Inter Milan (H) – 30 April – Champions League Semi-final

arts.ttl: Champions League Considering 3 Format Changes Amid Arsenal Complaint
arts.sum: UEFA are set to meet a day before this season's final to discuss three potential changes to the Champions League schedule moving forward.

arts.ttl: Luis Enrique fumes as Ousmane Dembele problem emerges ahead of Arsenal vs PSG clash
arts.sum: PSG travel to Arsenal for the first leg of their Champions League semi-final next Tuesday, but concerns are emerging over star attacker Ousmane Dembele after his side were held to a draw by Nantes

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta already needs to override Andrea Berta to secure £25m signing for Arsenal - opinion
